arts.ttl: Tottenham injuries: Every player out for semi-final clash with Liverpool
arts.sum: Elsewhere, Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Ben Davies are all absent at centre-back, while Destiny Udogie is out for the long-term having recently sustained a hamstring injury. Fortunately for Postecoglou, Tottenham don't have any injury issues in midfield, but they will be without James Maddison and Pape Matar Sarr on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: How much would Elon Musk have to pay to buy Liverpool? Premier League club's worth revealed after his father claimed billionaire wants to buy them
arts.sum: Reds fans were shocked to hear the multi-multi-multi-billionaire's father suggest on Tuesday afternoon that his son did, indeed, have some sort of interest in purchasing the club, however minor.

arts.ttl: Tottenham full squad for Liverpool Carabao Cup tie revealed as Antonin Kinsky decision made
arts.sum: For the recent clash against Newcastle, Postecoglou was forced to start Brandon Austin between the sticks with Fraser Forster, who had been deployed in the enforced absence of Guglielmo Vicario due an to injury, unavailable with an illness bug that went around the Tottenham squad. Ange Postecoglou could hand Antonin Kinsky his Tottenham Hotspur debut against Liverpool in the Carabao Cup just a few days after him completing a January transfer.

arts.ttl: ‘There is substance’: Tottenham genuinely want to sign ‘unbelievable’ defender this month – journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham need more bodies through the door in the January transfer window. Tottenham have already made one signing in the shape of Antonin Kinsky, and...

arts.ttl: 'Look': Arne Slot says another Liverpool star made a mistake vs Man United along with Trent Alexander-Arnold
Tottenham held entourage transfer meeting yesterday – Pushing ahead for January signing
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur currently find themselves 12th in the Premier League and will be looking to bolster their squad in the January transfer window. Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani is one name that has been linked with Ange Postecoglou’s side. arts.sum: Liverpool have been the subject of speculation over a takeover from billionaire Elon Musk

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs Liverpool, Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Tottenham Hale is a fully accessible station with access to Victoria line and Greater Anglia services. Supporters using the Victoria line, including wheelchair users and those with limited mobility, are advised to use Tottenham Hale rather than Seven Sisters as it is a shorter journey to and from the stadium.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sent blunt Mohamed Salah contract warning - 'It's not sustainable'
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's future remains up in the air with the Liverpool star's contract due to expire next summer and former Premier League striker Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink believes the Reds should let him go
